mapper.sql: id, orderno, customerno, userno, deptno, modelno, quantity, price, feerate, tradecompanyid, type, remark, inserttime, isnew, applyno, applyno_item, canbackquantity, tocustomerstock, neworderno, rorder_no, rorder_item, state_code, updatetime
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.salesinvoice_mid_info
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.salesinvoice_mid_info (id, orderno, customerno, userno, deptno, modelno, quantity, price, feerate, tradecompanyid, type, remark, inserttime, isnew, applyno, applyno_item, canbackquantity, tocustomerstock, neworderno, rorder_no, rorder_item, state_code, updatetime) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{feerate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isnew,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applynoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{canbackquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tocustomerstock,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{neworderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
